      • Past Speakers of the APA Assembly
        • Share on Facebook
        • Post to X (formerly Twitter)
        • Share on LinkedIn
        • Send as Email

      Past Speakers of the APA Assembly

      In 1952, the APA amended its Bylaws to establish the Assembly of District Branches. The following year, in 1953, sixteen District Branches came together to form the first APA District Branch Assembly, with Joseph L. Abramson elected as its leader. This significant organizational development aimed to provide broader representation and diverse perspectives in shaping the Association's affairs.
